drl:
rule "R0"
when
    ( T1(!(f0 >= "beta")) and T1(f0 matches "a+a[al]") )
    or
    ( T1(!(f0 >= "beta"), f2 == false) and T1(f0 matches "a+a[al]") )
    or
    ( T1(!(f0 >= "beta")) and T1(f0 matches "a+a[al]") )
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -9
no-loop
when
    accumulate( T1($s1_0 : f1); $a1_0 : average($s1_0) )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience 4
when
    ( T1(!(f0 >= "beta")) and T1(f0 matches "a+a[al]") )
    or
    ( T1(!(f0 >= "beta")) and T1(f2 != false) )
    or
    ( T1(f2 == false) and T1(f0 matches "a+a[al]", f0 matches "[a-z]") )
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    ( not T0() )
    or
    ( not T0() )
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T0(f0 == false)
then
    insert(new T1("a", 4.0, $p4_0.isF0()));
    insertLogical(new T1("b", 2.5, $p4_0.isF1()));
    modify($p4_0) { setF0(true), setF1(true) }
end
rule "R5"
when
    T1(f0 contains "a", f0 >= "ab", $b5_0_0 : f2, $b5_0_1 : f1)
then
end
